F-Droid Repo by nihaltp

This is a repository of apps made by nihaltp. Feel free to try them out!

Currently it serves 2 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://nihaltp.github.io/fdroid-repo/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
07 AE 85 3D 08 61 D7 12 61 9E 8D C2 A3 50 B9 7D 1F 2B 61 F6 D3 C5 92 1A 32 71 7E BE 1A 94 D6 52
